channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Yep, a mom's COVID shot during pregnancy protects her baby, a large study finds
item.description: A 3-year study published in Pediatrics examined newborns in Norway. It found a clear benefit for the baby when mom gets a COVID vaccination during pregnancy.
item.content:encoded:
A 3-year study published in Pediatrics examined newborns in Norway. It found a clear benefit for the baby when mom gets a COVID vaccination during pregnancy.

(Image credit: Didier Pallages)
item.dc:creator: Tara Haelle

item.title: Thousands of U.S. troops deploy to Middle East. And, the latest on DHS funding talks
item.description: The U.S. is sending thousands of paratroopers from the 82nd Airborne to the Middle East. And, congressional Republicans present Democrats with a new deal to fund the Department of Homeland Security.
item.content:encoded:
The U.S. is sending thousands of paratroopers from the 82nd Airborne to the Middle East. And, congressional Republicans present Democrats with a new deal to fund the Department of Homeland Security.

(Image credit: Alex Wong)

item.title: The Pentagon orders troops from the 82nd Airborne Division to deploy to the Middle East
item.description: Nearly a month into the Iran war, the Trump administration is keeping its options open: It says it's pursuing diplomatic solutions, while deploying thousands of paratroopers to the Middle East.
item.content:encoded:
Nearly a month into the Iran war, the Trump administration is keeping its options open: It says it's pursuing diplomatic solutions, while deploying thousands of paratroopers to the Middle East.

(Image credit: Fabio Bucciarelli/Middle East Images)
item.dc:creator: NPR Staff

item.title: They gave her business a lifeline, then froze all her money
item.description: A murky corner of the financial world is now the fastest-growing source of funding for small businesses. One state, Connecticut, had given these lenders unusual power. That may be about to change.
item.content:encoded: A murky corner of the financial world is now the fastest-growing source of funding for small businesses. One state, Connecticut, had given these lenders unusual power. That may be about to change.
item.dc:creator: Alina Selyukh

item.title: A shelter village provides a bridge to permanent housing
item.description: Shelter villages offer temporary and private places for the unhoused to sleep and store belongings. One of the newest, The Bridge, opened recently in central Illinois.
item.content:encoded:
Shelter villages offer temporary and private places for the unhoused to sleep and store belongings. One of the newest, The Bridge, opened recently in central Illinois.

(Image credit: Emily Bollinger)
item.dc:creator: Emily Bollinger

item.title: Your data is everywhere. The government is buying it without a warrant
item.description: Data brokers buy up huge amounts of information from cell phones and browsers to sell for targeted advertising. But the government, including ICE, also buys the data.
item.content:encoded:
Data brokers buy up huge amounts of information from cell phones and browsers to sell for targeted advertising. But the government, including ICE, also buys the data.

(Image credit: Mandel Ngan)
item.dc:creator: Jude Joffe-Block

item.title: Are you sure you know what 'gaslighting' is?
item.description: Therapists say we're overusing the word. Here's what it actually means — and what the Ingrid Bergman film that helped birth the word can teach us about it.
item.content:encoded:
Therapists say we're overusing the word. Here's what it actually means — and what the Ingrid Bergman film that helped birth the word can teach us about it.

(Image credit: Herbert Dorfman)
item.dc:creator: Emma Bowman

item.title: How Trump's Iran war objectives have shifted over time
item.description: Here is a reminder of some of what he has said - and where the US is now.
item.content:encoded:
Here is a reminder of some of what he has said - and where the US is now.

(Image credit: JIM WATSON)
item.dc:creator: Franco Ordoñez

item.title: OpenAI pulls the plug on Sora, the viral AI video app that sparked deepfake concerns
item.description: OpenAI said Tuesday that it was "saying goodbye to the Sora app" and that it would share more soon about how to preserve what users already created on the app.
item.content:encoded:
OpenAI said Tuesday that it was "saying goodbye to the Sora app" and that it would share more soon about how to preserve what users already created on the app.

(Image credit: Michael Dwyer)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Rubio plans travel to France to sell Iran war to skeptical G7 allies
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio will travel to France this week to try to sell America's skeptical Group of Seven allies on the Iran war that has sent global fuel prices soaring.
item.content:encoded:
Secretary of State Marco Rubio will travel to France this week to try to sell America's skeptical Group of Seven allies on the Iran war that has sent global fuel prices soaring.

(Image credit: Julia Demaree Nikhinson)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
